items.title: When autistic people ask AI programs for life advice, mentioning their diagnosis prompts these systems to recommend highly conservative choices like skipping social events or avoiding romance. This shift in advice reveals a hidden tension where the technology relies heavily on stereotypes.
items.title_original: When autistic people ask AI programs for life advice, mentioning their diagnosis prompts these systems to recommend highly conservative choices like skipping social events or avoiding romance. This shift in advice reveals a hidden tension where the technology relies heavily on stereotypes.
items.title_en: When autistic people ask AI programs for life advice, mentioning their diagnosis prompts these systems to recommend highly conservative choices like skipping social events or avoiding romance. This shift in advice reveals a hidden tension where the technology relies heavily on stereotypes.
items.title_zh: 当自闭症患者向人工智能程序寻求生活建议时，提及他们的诊断结果会促使这些系统推荐高度保守的选择，例如跳过社交活动或避免浪漫。这种建议的转变揭示了一种隐藏的紧张关系，即技术严重依赖刻板印象。
